case_title: MITCHELL, JAMAL vs. INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITCHELL, JAMAL AS TO DEFENDANT INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF CALIF. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-27-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-09-1998

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-03-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON FEB-03-1998, OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER JAMAL MITCHELL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-18-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-27-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IF NOT PAID BY 2/18/98 OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF(S) IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE OFENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-08-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC TO PLTF(S) IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS
CORRESPONDENCE TO THE COURT RECEIVED FROM PLAINTIFF

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-16-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-16-1998, TO FILE POS, OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-02-1998 CONTINUED FROM SEP-16-1998 TO OCT-21-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
$400.00 SANCTIONS IMPOSED ARE VACATED PURSUANT TO PLTF'S LETTER.
